name: Tortilla Soup Texas Style
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 6-quart stockpot, combine onion, garlic, and broth.
2. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and stir well.
4. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Serve hot in warm bowls with some broken tortilla chips in each bowl.
6. Garnish with sprigs of fresh cilantro.
